movies.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
movies.synopsis: A voyage to Jupiter turns existential when the supercomputer HAL 9000 begins pursuing its mission at any cost.

movies.title: Blade Runner
movies.synopsis: A retired cop hunts rogue androids in a rain-soaked future Los Angeles where the line between human and machine has blurred.

movies.title: Blade Runner 2049
movies.synopsis: A replicant blade runner uncovers a secret that could destabilise the fragile order of a crumbling future world.

movies.title: The Terminator
movies.synopsis: A killing machine from the future is sent back to assassinate the mother of humanity's resistance leader before she gives birth.

movies.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
movies.synopsis: A reprogrammed Terminator must protect a young John Connor from a more advanced liquid-metal machine sent to kill him.

movies.title: Alien
movies.synopsis: The crew of a commercial space freighter encounters a lethal extraterrestrial organism with a terrifying reproductive cycle.

movies.title: Aliens
movies.synopsis: Sole survivor Ripley returns to the alien-infested moon with a squad of marines, only to find herself catastrophically outgunned.

movies.title: The Matrix
movies.synopsis: A hacker discovers that reality is a computer simulation and joins a rebellion against the machines that built it.

movies.title: Interstellar
movies.synopsis: A team of astronauts travels through a wormhole near Saturn in a desperate bid to find humanity a new home.

movies.title: Arrival
movies.synopsis: A linguist recruited to communicate with alien visitors begins to perceive time in an entirely unexpected way.

movies.title: Dune: Part One
movies.synopsis: A noble heir is thrust into the brutal politics of a desert planet whose sand holds the most valuable substance in the universe.

movies.title: Dune: Part Two
movies.synopsis: Paul Atreides unites with the desert-dwelling Fremen and embraces a messianic destiny with galaxy-wide consequences.

movies.title: Moon
movies.synopsis: A lone mining station worker near the end of his three-year lunar contract begins to question his own identity.

movies.title: Ex Machina
movies.synopsis: A programmer invited to administer the Turing test to a humanoid AI begins to suspect the experiment is not what it seems.

movies.title: Her
movies.synopsis: A lonely writer falls in love with the intuitive operating system he has installed on his computer.

movies.title: Gravity
movies.synopsis: Two astronauts are left stranded in orbit after their shuttle is destroyed by a debris field and must fight their way back to Earth.

movies.title: The Martian
movies.synopsis: An astronaut presumed dead is left alone on Mars and must use his ingenuity to survive until a rescue mission can reach him.

movies.title: Looper
movies.synopsis: A contract killer in 2044 discovers his latest target is his future self, sent back from thirty years ahead to be executed.

movies.title: Die Hard
movies.synopsis: A New York cop visits his estranged wife in Los Angeles and becomes the lone defender against a gang of thieves who seize her office tower.

movies.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
movies.synopsis: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a warrior joins a rebel driver on a relentless high-octane dash for freedom.

movies.title: The Dark Knight
movies.synopsis: Batman faces a sadistic criminal genius known as the Joker who is determined to plunge Gotham City into chaos.

movies.title: Heat
movies.synopsis: A driven detective and a meticulous thief circle each other across Los Angeles as a climactic confrontation becomes inevitable.

movies.title: John Wick
movies.synopsis: A retired hitman comes out of retirement when the gangster son who stole his car and killed his dog discovers what he used to be.

movies.title: Inception
movies.synopsis: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea.

movies.title: Predator
movies.synopsis: An elite military rescue team in the Central American jungle discovers it is being hunted by a technologically advanced alien.

movies.title: Ocean's Eleven
movies.synopsis: A recently released con man assembles a crew of specialists to simultaneously rob three Las Vegas casinos.

movies.title: The Raid
movies.synopsis: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless crime lord and must fight their way out floor by floor.

movies.title: Speed
movies.synopsis: An LAPD officer must keep a city bus above 50mph or a bomb planted on board will detonate.

movies.title: Pulp Fiction
movies.synopsis: The lives of two hitmen, a boxer, a gangster's wife, and a pair of diner robbers intertwine in four tales of crime and redemption.

movies.title: Goodfellas
movies.synopsis: A young man rises through the ranks of the New York mob and pays the price for the lifestyle he always wanted.

movies.title: The Godfather
movies.synopsis: The patriarch of a powerful Mafia dynasty transfers control of his empire to his reluctant youngest son.

movies.title: The Godfather Part II
movies.synopsis: Two parallel stories trace the young Vito Corleone's rise to power and his son Michael's consolidation of a criminal empire.

movies.title: Fargo
movies.synopsis: A hapless car salesman hires two criminals to kidnap his wife, setting off a chain of catastrophically bungled events investigated by a very pregnant police chief.

movies.title: No Country for Old Men
movies.synopsis: A hunter stumbles onto a drug deal gone wrong and takes the money, triggering a relentless pursuit by an unstoppable contract killer.

movies.title: Seven
movies.synopsis: Two detectives track a methodical killer who uses the seven deadly sins as the framework for a series of elaborately staged murders.

movies.title: Oldboy
movies.synopsis: A man imprisoned without explanation for fifteen years is suddenly released and given five days to find out who destroyed his life.

movies.title: The Usual Suspects
movies.synopsis: Five criminals brought together for a police lineup find themselves at the mercy of a mythical crime lord no one is sure actually exists.

movies.title: City of God
movies.synopsis: Two boys grow up in a dangerous Rio de Janeiro housing project, one choosing a camera and one a gun.

movies.title: Parasite
movies.synopsis: A penniless family schemes its way into the household of a wealthy employer, until a secret buried under the house threatens to unravel everything.

movies.title: The Big Lebowski
movies.synopsis: A lazy Los Angeles slacker is mistaken for a millionaire of the same name and dragged into a kidnapping scheme far beyond his comprehension.

movies.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
movies.synopsis: King Arthur and his hapless knights embark on a quest for the Holy Grail, repeatedly thwarted by everything from French taunters to killer rabbits.

movies.title: Groundhog Day
movies.synopsis: An arrogant TV weatherman finds himself living the same Groundhog Day over and over in a small Pennsylvania town.

movies.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
movies.synopsis: The adventures of a legendary hotel concierge and his lobby boy protégé amid murder, theft, and the outbreak of war in a fictional European republic.

movies.title: Office Space
movies.synopsis: Three software engineers hatch a scheme to embezzle from their soul-crushing tech company, to entertainingly disastrous effect.

movies.title: Hot Fuzz
movies.synopsis: London's top police officer is transferred to a quaint English village that turns out to be hiding a shocking secret beneath its perfect surface.

movies.title: Shaun of the Dead
movies.synopsis: A slacker attempts to save his loved ones from a zombie outbreak while also trying to salvage his relationship and self-respect.

movies.title: In Bruges
movies.synopsis: Two hitmen hide out in the medieval Belgian city of Bruges after a job goes wrong, waiting for orders and arguing about art.

movies.title: The Shining
movies.synopsis: A writer and his family become winter caretakers of a remote Colorado hotel, where an evil presence drives him toward madness.

movies.title: Get Out
movies.synopsis: A young Black man visits his white girlfriend's family estate and uncovers a disturbing secret behind their unsettling hospitality.

movies.title: The Thing
movies.synopsis: A research crew in Antarctica encounters an alien organism that can perfectly imitate any living being it has consumed.

movies.title: A Quiet Place
movies.synopsis: A family is forced to live in near-total silence to avoid being hunted by creatures with highly acute hearing.

movies.title: Hereditary
movies.synopsis: A family begins to unravel following the death of their secretive grandmother, falling prey to a terrifying inherited curse.

movies.title: Halloween
movies.synopsis: A masked killer escapes a psychiatric institution on Halloween night and returns to his hometown to stalk a group of teenagers.

movies.title: 28 Days Later
movies.synopsis: A man wakes from a coma to find London deserted, then joins a band of survivors fleeing the rage-infected population.

movies.title: Spirited Away
movies.synopsis: A sullen ten-year-old wanders into a mysterious spirit realm and must work at a magical bathhouse to rescue her transformed parents.

movies.title: Princess Mononoke
movies.synopsis: A cursed warrior travels to a forest and becomes entangled in a war between industrialising humans and the ancient gods of the wild.

movies.title: My Neighbor Totoro
movies.synopsis: Two sisters who move to rural Japan encounter a giant forest spirit called Totoro who becomes their gentle magical guardian.

movies.title: WALL-E
movies.synopsis: A lonely robot left to clean an abandoned Earth falls in love and embarks on a journey that carries the fate of humanity.

movies.title: Up
movies.synopsis: A 78-year-old balloon salesman ties thousands of balloons to his house to fly to South America, with a young Wilderness Scout accidentally along.

movies.title: The Lion King
movies.synopsis: A young lion prince flees his kingdom after his father is murdered by his uncle, only to return years later to claim his birthright.

movies.title: Toy Story
movies.synopsis: A cowboy toy feels threatened when a cool new spaceman action figure arrives and becomes the new favourite of their owner.

movies.title: Akira
movies.synopsis: A biker gang member's childhood friend awakens monstrous psychic powers in a post-apocalyptic Neo-Tokyo and threatens to tear the city apart.

movies.title: Ghost in the Shell
movies.synopsis: A cyborg police officer in a cybernetic future hunts a mysterious hacker while questioning the nature of her own identity.

movies.title: Howl's Moving Castle
movies.synopsis: A young woman cursed to live in an old body finds shelter in a wizard's enchanted moving castle and slowly uncovers the cost of magic.

movies.title: The Iron Giant
movies.synopsis: A nine-year-old boy in 1950s Maine befriends a giant robot from outer space and must protect his new friend from a paranoid government agent.

movies.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
movies.director: Bob Persichetti, Peter Ramsey, Rodney Rothman
movies.synopsis: A teenager from Brooklyn discovers he is one of many Spider-People across parallel dimensions, all pulled into a battle to save the multiverse.

movies.title: The Shawshank Redemption
movies.synopsis: A banker wrongly convicted of murder forges an unlikely friendship with a fellow prisoner over nearly two decades inside a brutal Maine penitentiary.

movies.title: 12 Angry Men
movies.synopsis: A lone dissenting juror in a murder trial slowly persuades his peers to question a seemingly open-and-shut conviction.

movies.title: Schindler's List
movies.synopsis: A war profiteer gradually becomes the unlikely saviour of over a thousand Polish Jews during the Holocaust.

movies.title: Whiplash
movies.synopsis: A driven young jazz drummer at an elite music conservatory falls under the brutal spell of a tyrannical conductor.

movies.title: Amélie
movies.synopsis: A shy Parisian waitress secretly orchestrates the happiness of those around her while struggling to find love for herself.

movies.title: Pan's Labyrinth
movies.synopsis: A young girl in post-Civil War Spain retreats into a dark fairy tale world of labyrinthine passages and terrifying creatures.

movies.title: Life is Beautiful
movies.synopsis: A Jewish Italian man uses imagination and humour to shield his young son from the grim realities of a Nazi concentration camp.

movies.title: Das Boot
movies.synopsis: A German U-boat crew endures the crushing psychological pressure and physical danger of patrols in the Second World War Atlantic.

movies.title: Seven Samurai
movies.synopsis: A poor farming village hires seven ronin to defend it from bandits, in a tale of sacrifice, duty, and the cost of war.

movies.title: The Lives of Others
movies.synopsis: An East German Stasi officer assigned to monitor a loyal playwright finds himself quietly transformed by what he hears.

movies.title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
movies.synopsis: A man undergoing a procedure to erase his ex-girlfriend from his memory discovers mid-operation that he wants to keep her.

movies.title: Lost in Translation
movies.synopsis: An aging movie star and a young newlywed form an unexpected bond during their brief overlapping stays in a Tokyo hotel.

movies.title: There Will Be Blood
movies.synopsis: A ruthless oil prospector in early 20th-century California builds an empire at the cost of everything and everyone around him.

movies.title: The Truman Show
movies.synopsis: A man gradually realises that his entire life is an elaborate television production and he is its unwitting star.
